title: Cable basics: c4f and c4b
sources: Weldon's Practical Knitting, later series (1890s onward), Aran-pattern sections — the c4f / c4b structure is reproduced in dozens of Weldon's patterns
Public-domain Aran knitting tradition; specific 1930s Irish cable-pattern collections in the National Library of Ireland are out of UK copyright
notes: First anchor that exercises the SVG chart renderer. Ship two `craftChart` blocks — one for c4f and one for c4b — each showing a single 4-row × 6-stitch repeat. The reader compares the two and sees the lean direction. Include a 'how to read this chart' paragraph the first time the chart appears.
